tasks.summary: Add structured JSON logging with django-structlog
tasks.description: Add django-structlog and python-json-logger to requirements.txt. Configure investor_app/settings.py with JSON formatter, structlog processors, and console handler. Every request gets structured log output.

acceptance_criteria.description: settings.py has structlog.configure() with JSON formatter
python manage.py check passes with the new config

tasks.description: Create core/middleware.py with RequestTimingMiddleware class. Measures every HTTP request (method, path, status, duration_ms, request_id) and logs as structured JSON. Register in settings.MIDDLEWARE as the last middleware.

acceptance_criteria.description: Middleware logs method, path, status_code, duration_ms fields
python manage.py check passes with middleware registered
Local container shows JSON log output on requests

tasks.summary: Create deploy failure rate alert check
tasks.description: Create scripts/alert-check.sh that queries the last 10 Tier 2 Governance runs via gh CLI. Computes failure rate as percentage. Emits CI warning if > 10%. Add make test-alerts target.

acceptance_criteria.description: Script outputs failure rate as percentage

tasks.summary: Create API surface validation script + CI gate
tasks.description: Create scripts/validate-api-surface.sh that validates docs/API_SURFACE.md against actual source code. Checks that every documented function signature still exists in the codebase. Add a CI gate in ci-quality.yml that runs this on every PR.

acceptance_criteria.description: Script exits 0 when docs match code
Script exits 1 when a documented function is missing
ci-quality.yml has api-surface job that runs the script
